mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT STAGE_LEVEL FROM TBL_PVE_SUBSTAGES ORDER BY STAGE_LEVEL ASC
SELECT STAGE_LEVEL as stageLevel, SUB_LEVEL as subLevel, SUB_TITLE as subTitle, OPPONENT_TEAM_NAME as opponentTeamName FROM TBL_PVE_SUBSTAGES WHERE STAGE_LEVEL = #{stageLevel} ORDER BY SUB_LEVEL ASC

SELECT STAGE_LEVEL as stageLevel, SUB_LEVEL as subLevel, SUB_TITLE as subTitle, OPPONENT_TEAM_NAME as opponentTeamName FROM TBL_PVE_SUBSTAGES WHERE STAGE_LEVEL = #{stageLevel} AND SUB_LEVEL = #{subLevel}
SELECT NVL(MAX(SUB_LEVEL), 0) FROM TBL_PVE_SUBSTAGES WHERE STAGE_LEVEL = #{stageLevel}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_PVE_SUBSTAGES (STAGE_LEVEL, SUB_LEVEL, SUB_TITLE, OPPONENT_TEAM_NAME) VALUES (#{stageLevel}, #{subLevel}, #{subTitle}, #{opponentTeamName})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_PVE_OPPONENTS WHERE STAGE_LEVEL = #{stageLevel} AND SUB_LEVEL = #{subLevel}
DELETE FROM TBL_PVE_SUBSTAGES WHERE STAGE_LEVEL = #{stageLevel} AND SUB_LEVEL = #{subLevel}
DELETE FROM USER_PVE_SUBSTAGE_PROGRESS WHERE STAGE_LEVEL = #{stageLevel} AND SUB_LEVEL = #{subLevel}
mapper.select: SELECT p.PLAYER_SEQ as playerSeq, p.PLAYER_NAME as playerName, p.RACE as race, p.RARITY as rarity, p.STAT_ATTACK as statAttack, p.STAT_DEFENSE as statDefense, p.STAT_MACRO as statMacro, p.STAT_MICRO as statMicro, p.STAT_LUCK as statLuck, p.PLAYER_IMG_URL as playerImgUrl, opp.SET_NUMBER as setNumber, opp.OPPONENT_ID as opponentId, opp.BUILD_ID_VS_T as buildIdVsT, opp.BUILD_ID_VS_Z as buildIdVsZ, opp.BUILD_ID_VS_P as buildIdVsP FROM TBL_PVE_OPPONENTS opp JOIN TBL_PLAYERS p ON opp.PLAYER_SEQ = p.PLAYER_SEQ WHERE opp.STAGE_LEVEL = #{stageLevel} AND opp.SUB_LEVEL = #{subLevel} ORDER BY opp.SET_NUMBER ASC
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_PVE_OPPONENTS WHERE STAGE_LEVEL = #{stageLevel} AND SUB_LEVEL = #{subLevel} AND SET_NUMBER = #{setNumber}
DELETE FROM TBL_PVE_OPPONENTS WHERE STAGE_LEVEL = #{stageLevel} AND SUB_LEVEL = #{subLevel}
mapper.select: SELECT MAP_ID as mapId, MAP_NAME as mapName, DESCRIPTION as description, WIN_RATE_T as winRateT, WIN_RATE_P as winRateP, WIN_RATE_Z as winRateZ FROM TBL_MAPS ORDER BY MAP_NAME ASC

SELECT sm.SET_NUMBER as setNumber, m.MAP_ID as mapId, m.MAP_NAME as mapName, m.WIN_RATE_T as winRateT, m.WIN_RATE_P as winRateP, m.WIN_RATE_Z as winRateZ FROM TBL_PVE_SUBSTAGE_MAPS sm JOIN TBL_MAPS m ON sm.MAP_ID = m.MAP_ID WHERE sm.STAGE_LEVEL = #{stageLevel} AND sm.SUB_LEVEL = #{subLevel} ORDER BY sm.SET_NUMBER ASC
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_PVE_SUBSTAGE_MAPS WHERE STAGE_LEVEL = #{stageLevel} AND SUB_LEVEL = #{subLevel} AND SET_NUMBER = #{setNumber}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_PVE_SUBSTAGE_MAPS (STAGE_LEVEL, SUB_LEVEL, SET_NUMBER, MAP_ID) VALUES (#{stageLevel}, #{subLevel}, #{setNumber}, #{mapId})

INSERT INTO TBL_PVE_OPPONENTS ( OPPONENT_ID, STAGE_LEVEL, SUB_LEVEL, PLAYER_SEQ, SET_NUMBER, BUILD_ID_VS_T, BUILD_ID_VS_Z, BUILD_ID_VS_P ) VALUES ( SEQ_PVE_OPPONENTS.NEXTVAL, #{stageLevel}, #{subLevel}, #{playerSeq}, #{setNumber}, #{buildIdVsT, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{buildIdVsZ, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{buildIdVsP, jdbcType=NUMERIC} )
mapper.select: SELECT PACK_SEQ as packSeq, PACK_NAME as packName, DESCRIPTION as description, COST_CRYSTAL as costCrystal, BANNER_IMG_URL as bannerImgUrl, IS_AVAILABLE as isAvailable FROM TBL_PACKS ORDER BY PACK_SEQ ASC

SELECT PACK_SEQ as packSeq, PACK_NAME as packName, DESCRIPTION as description, COST_CRYSTAL as costCrystal, BANNER_IMG_URL as bannerImgUrl, IS_AVAILABLE as isAvailable FROM TBL_PACKS WHERE PACK_SEQ = #{value}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_PACKS ( PACK_SEQ, PACK_NAME, DESCRIPTION, COST_CRYSTAL, BANNER_IMG_URL, IS_AVAILABLE ) VALUES ( (SELECT NVL(MAX(PACK_SEQ), 0) + 1 FROM TBL_PACKS), #{packName}, #{description}, #{costCrystal}, #{bannerImgUrl}, NVL(#{isAvailable}, 'Y') )
mapper.update: UPDATE TBL_PACKS SET PACK_NAME = #{packName}, DESCRIPTION = #{description}, COST_CRYSTAL = #{costCrystal}, BANNER_IMG_URL = #{bannerImgUrl}, IS_AVAILABLE = #{isAvailable} WHERE PACK_SEQ = #{packSeq}
UPDATE TBL_PACKS SET IS_AVAILABLE = #{isAvailable} WHERE PACK_SEQ = #{packSeq}
mapper.select: SELECT PACK_SEQ as packSeq, PACK_NAME as packName FROM TBL_PACKS ORDER BY PACK_SEQ ASC
SELECT PLAYER_SEQ FROM TBL_PACK_CONTENTS WHERE PACK_SEQ = #{packSeq}

SELECT PLAYER_SEQ as playerSeq, PLAYER_NAME as playerName, RACE as race, RARITY as rarity, STAT_ATTACK as statAttack, STAT_DEFENSE as statDefense, STAT_MACRO as statMacro, STAT_MICRO as statMicro, STAT_LUCK as statLuck, PLAYER_IMG_URL as playerImgUrl, PLAYER_COST as playerCost FROM TBL_PLAYERS ORDER BY CASE RARITY WHEN 'UR' THEN 1 WHEN 'SSR' THEN 2 WHEN 'SR' THEN 3 WHEN 'R' THEN 4 ELSE 5 END, PLAYER_NAME ASC

SELECT PLAYER_SEQ as playerSeq, PLAYER_NAME as playerName, RACE as race, RARITY as rarity, STAT_ATTACK as statAttack, STAT_DEFENSE as statDefense, STAT_MACRO as statMacro, STAT_MICRO as statMicro, STAT_LUCK as statLuck, PLAYER_IMG_URL as playerImgUrl, PLAYER_COST as playerCost FROM TBL_PLAYERS ORDER BY CASE RARITY WHEN 'UR' THEN 1 WHEN 'SSR' THEN 2 WHEN 'SR' THEN 3 WHEN 'R' THEN 4 ELSE 5 END, PLAYER_NAME ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE TBL_PLAYERS SET PLAYER_NAME = #{playerName}, RACE = #{race}, RARITY = #{rarity}, STAT_ATTACK = #{statAttack}, STAT_DEFENSE = #{statDefense}, STAT_MACRO = #{statMacro}, STAT_MICRO = #{statMicro}, STAT_LUCK = #{statLuck}, PLAYER_IMG_URL = #{playerImgUrl}, PLAYER_COST = #{playerCost} WHERE PLAYER_SEQ = #{playerSeq}
mapper.select: SELECT p.PACK_SEQ as packSeq, p.PACK_NAME as packName FROM TBL_PACK_CONTENTS pc JOIN TBL_PACKS p ON pc.PACK_SEQ = p.PACK_SEQ WHERE pc.PLAYER_SEQ = #{value} ORDER BY p.PACK_SEQ ASC

SELECT p.PACK_SEQ as packSeq, p.PACK_NAME as packName, pc.DRAW_PROBABILITY as drawProbability FROM TBL_PACK_CONTENTS pc JOIN TBL_PACKS p ON pc.PACK_SEQ = p.PACK_SEQ WHERE pc.PLAYER_SEQ = #{value} ORDER BY p.PACK_SEQ ASC
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_PACK_CONTENTS WHERE PACK_SEQ = #{packSeq} AND PLAYER_SEQ = #{playerSeq}
